announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about general updates on demerger of Hotels Business into ITC Hotels Limited

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about presentation on demerger of Hotel Business - update

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Demerger of the Hotels Business of the Company'.

announcements.headline: Demerger
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange vide its letter dated August 28, 2013 regarding Demerger of Non-Engineering Business of Wimco Ltd. into the Company.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange that consequent to the Scheme of Amalgamation of Wills Corporation Limited (Wills), a wholly owned subsidiary of Russell Credit Limited (Russell Credit), with Russell Credit becoming effective from March 22, 2016, Wills has ceased to be a subsidiary of Russell Credit and consequently of ITC Limited. Russell Credit is a wholly owned subsidiary of ITC Limited.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Media Statement on ITC Board accords in-principle approval to demerge the Hotels Businessinto a new entity to be listed pursuant to a scheme of arrangement'.

announcements.headline: News Verification
announcements.body: The Exchange has sought clarification from ITC Limited with respect to recent news item captioned ITC Share Price: BIG Breakout! Check what market experts say on this rally. Big demerger of ITC is on cards and three companies will be formed after the demerger..  The response from the Company is attached.

announcements.headline: Record Date
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange that Record date for the purpose of Demerger of the Hotels Business of the Company  is 06-Jan-2025.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about Demerger of the Hotels Business of the Company - Record Date

announcements.headline: News Verification
announcements.body: The Exchange has sought clarification from ITC Limited with respect to recent news item captioned ITC Share Price: BIG Breakout! Check what market experts say on this rally. Big demerger of ITC is on cards and three companies will be formed after the demerger.. The response from the Company is awaited.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about update on Demerger of the Hotels Business of the Company.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange that the Scheme of Amalgamation of BFIL Finance Limited with Russell Credit Limited became effective from 16th May, 2016. BFIL Finance Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of Russell Credit Limited, which in turn is a wholly owned subsidiary of the company. Consequently, BFIL Finance Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of Russell Credit Limited and that of the company with effect from May 16, 2016.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Investor Presentation on Demerger of Hotels Business'.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation/MergerWe write to advise in terms of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, that the Scheme of amalgamation of Hobbits International Foods Private Limited and Sunrise Sheetgrah Private Limited with the Company (the Scheme) has been sanctioned by the Hon ble National Company Law Tribunal, Allahabad Bench.��Certified copies of the aforesaid Order have been filed today with the Registrar of Companies,�� Kanpur and West Bengal. Consequently, the Scheme has become effective from today,��i.e. 12th August, 2021.��

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has submitted to the Exchange a copy of the advertisements published on April 09, 2014 in terms of the Order dated March 31, 2014 of the Hon'ble High Court at Calcutta. The advertisements published are in respect of the Notice for hearing of the petition for confirmation of the Scheme of Arrangement between Wimco Limited and the Company and their respective shareholders.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation of Sresta Natural Bioproducts Private Limited and Wimco Limited with the Company

announcements.headline: News Verification
announcements.body: The Exchange has sought clarification from ITC Limited with respect to recent news item captioned ITC's demerger for hotel business underway; shares hit 52-week high; check details.  The response from the Company is attached.

announcements.headline: News Verification
announcements.body: The Exchange has sought clarification from ITC Limited with respect to recent news item captioned ITC's demerger for hotel business underway; shares hit 52-week high; check details.  The response from the Company is awaited.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange that the Scheme of Amalgamation of Classic Infrastructure & Development Limited [a wholly owned subsidiary of Greenacre Holdings Limited (Greenacre)] with Greenacre became effective from April 05, 2016. Greenacre is a wholly owned subsidiary of Russell Credit Limited, which in turn is a wholly owned subsidiary of ITC Limited. Consequently, Classic Infrastructure & Development Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of Greenacre and that of ITC Limited with effect from the said date.

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about Demerger of the Hotels Business of the Company

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation/MergerFurther to our letter dated 28th August, 2020, we write to advise in terms of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, that the Board of Directors of the Company at the meeting held on 4th September, 2020, approved amalgamation of Sunrise Foods Private Limited, Hobbits International Foods Private Limited and Sunrise Sheetgrah Private Limited with the Company.The Schemes of amalgamation, which are subject to approvals as necessary, will take effect from 27th July, 2020. Details of the aforesaid amalgamations, as required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 read with the SEBI Circular dated 9th September, 2015, are given in the Annexure.

announcements.headline: Demerger
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange that :"Further to our letter dated 24th March, 2014 , we write to advise that the Scheme of Arrangement between Wimco Limited (Wimco) and the Company and their respective shareholders for demerger of the Non- Engineering Business comprising Safety Matches Business and Agri (Forestry) Business of Wimco into the Company (the Scheme), has been sanctioned by the Hon'ble High Court of Judicature at Bombay and the Hon'ble High Court Calcutta. Certified copies of the said Orders have been filed with the respective Registrar of Companies on 19 June 2014 and 27 June, 2014. Consequent to the above, the Scheme has become effective from Friday, 27th June, 2014".

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation/Merger

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: ITC Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation/MergerFurther to our letters dated 4th September, 2020 and 30th September, 2020 on the subject, we write to advise in terms of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, that the Scheme of amalgamation of Sunrise Foods Private Limited (Sunrise) with the Company (the Scheme) has been sanctioned by the Hon ble National Company Law Tribunal, Kolkata Bench. Certified copies of the said Order have been filed today with the Registrar of Companies, West Bengal, both by the Company and Sunrise.��Consequent to the above, the Scheme has become effective from today, i.e. 1st April, 2021. Further, the two subsidiaries of Sunrise viz., Hobbits International Foods Private Limited and Sunrise Sheetgrah Private Limited have become direct wholly owned subsidiaries of the Company with effect from the said date.
